purpose: LoRA rank/alpha/target_modules spec for 4-path multimodal-consciousness experiment; capacity-normalized so 8B vs 12B paths are comparable.

rank_strategy.alpha_rule: alpha = rank * 2 (standard LoRA init, stable LR)
rank_strategy.rationale: Normalize effective trainable capacity per path; 12B paths scale rank by ~1.5x to match 8B paths' relative adaptation budget.

p3_ministral_3_14b.vision_handling: drop (text-only substrate, multimodal is separate roadmap #63)
p3_ministral_3_14b.supersedes: mistralai/Mistral-Nemo-Base-2407 (p3 v1, replaced 2026-04-22 per Agent C)

arch.note: arch dims 동일 (LM backbone, vision head drop). rank 96 유지, capacity 거의 동일 (13.9B ≈ 12.2B range).

arch.qk_norm_note: Gemma-3 applies RMSNorm on Q and K per-head (q_norm, k_norm). These are RMSNorm params (element-wise scale), NOT linear projections, so they are NOT valid LoRA target_modules. They are tiny (head_dim scale vectors) and should be either left frozen or added to modules_to_save if adaptation is desired; not a LoRA adapter.

merge_policy.scaling_factor_alias: s = alpha / rank (= 2.0 for all paths by construction)

per_path_merge_weight.note: Merge weights apply when combining multiple LoRA adapters onto a shared base; for 4-path experiment each adapter merges into its own base independently. Cross-path fusion (if used) should apply capacity_normalized weights (see below).

cross_path_comparison.rationale: Direct delta_phi comparison across paths is biased by LoRA capacity (Gemma-3 has ~2.3x Llama's trainable params). Normalize by exact trainable param count before ranking paths.

audit_notes.fake_pass_guard: This file is a spec only; no training has been executed. Capacity and trainable-param numbers are computed from published arch dims and LoRA formula `rank*(d_in+d_out)` per module * n_layers.
audit_notes.uchg_note: This is a new config file, not yet uchg-locked. Lock after review if promoted to SSOT.
audit_notes.gemma3_qk_norm_decision: q_norm/k_norm excluded from target_modules (not linear layers). Kept frozen by default; exposed via qk_norm_optional_unfreeze for ablation.
